## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run command '...'
2. With flags '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error output.

## Environment

- Go version (if building from source): [e.g. 1.22]
- Challenge type: [e.g. http-01, dns-01]
- DNS provider (if applicable): [e.g. cloudflare]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
